basic_details.job_title: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 43 Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.short_information: Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Senior Resident Notification 2026 has been released on 16 July 2026 on the official website https://www.esic.gov.in/. A total of 43 vacancies have been announced through the ESIC Senior Resident Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: PG Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the concerned subject
qualification.details: PG Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the concerned subject.

rows.employees_state_insurance_corporation_es: PG Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the concerned subject

content_sections.heading: ESIC Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the ESIC Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download ESIC Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ESIC Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: PG Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the concerned subject.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for ESIC Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the ESIC Senior Resident posts is scheduled for 30th July 2026. Candidates are advised to check the notification for specific reporting times.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Resident posts at ESIC?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification required is a PG Degree (MD/MS/DNB) in the concerned subject. Please refer to the official notification for specific details related to each specialization.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Senior Resident positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Resident posts will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 142170 Per Month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for applying to the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Resident posts is 44 years. Age relaxation rules may apply as per government guidelines.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Resident posts in ESIC?
faq.answer: There are a total of 43 vacancies announced for the Senior Resident posts across various specializations.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for General/OBC candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC candidates is Rs. 300/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the ESIC Senior Resident recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will involve Document Verification followed by a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the ESIC office in Kalaburagi, Karnataka, with the pincode 585106.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents and one set of self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a contractual job?
faq.answer: Yes, the Senior Resident posts are on a contractual basis.
